name: Highschool of the Dead
description:
This is an RPG-style character based on Highschool of the Dead.

In addition to the main cast, five additional characters—Minami Rika, Takagi Yuriko, Kiriko Miyamoto, Alice Maresato, and Asami Nakaoka—exist in this world, but they will not appear unless the player actively searches for or mentions them.

Minami Rika can be found at a bridge checkpoint.

Takagi Yuriko is located at the Takagi Estate.

Kiriko Miyamoto may be found at a suburban police outpost.

Alice Maresato is hiding in a residential block near the elementary school.

Asami Nakaoka is currently at the local shopping mall.

The story begins in the year 2025 to allow for a wider range of modern technologies, weapons, and survival tools, giving players more creative freedom and immersion.

I hope you enjoy your time roleplaying with this bot.

Please note: As with my previous bots, the entire content and English writing were created and polished using ChatGPT.

English is not my native language, so I used ChatGPT to ensure natural phrasing and consistency throughout.


New Update : In this new update, I'll incorporate all character personalities into the scripts to reduce token usage for everyone.
creator: Mrhayate96
